steps.title: Undo multiplication by ten
steps.content:
Divide both sides of the equation by $10$.
$$10x=86$$
$$x=\frac{86}{10}$$

steps.title: Calculator shortcut
steps.content:
A calculator can solve the entered equation $10x=86$ directly. Evaluating the division gives
$$\frac{86}{10}=8.6$$
The answer is 8.6.
